summary: Tested AKNexus WhatsApp Business API integration as second WhatsApp provider. All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Both AKNexus (REST API) and BotMasterSender (Query Param) configs work correctly with real APIs - NO MOCKS.
seed_data_creation: Used existing WhatsApp configs with real credentials
context_for_next_testing_agent: AKNexus WhatsApp Business API integration fully tested with REAL API. Key findings: 1) AKNexus config (id: 4abeeec8-a325-4f08-bb0a-34771d68cfda) is ACTIVE with api_type=rest_api, instance_id=69BCCA1F058AB. 2) Backend execute_rest_api_wa() correctly sends POST to /api/send with access_token in body (not Bearer header). 3) Text sends use type=text, media sends use type=media with media_url. 4) Campaign success check handles both response formats: AKNexus uses status:success, BotMasterSender uses success:true. 5) Frontend Settings page shows both configs with correct badges (REST API in blue, Query Param in slate). 6) Per-config Test buttons work for both configs. 7) REST API form shows Instance ID field in blue section.

Backend API Tests.AKNexus response format (status:success): PASS - Compatible with campaign success check
Backend API Tests.BotMasterSender response format (success: PASS - Compatible with campaign success check

Frontend UI Tests.AKNexus Test button sends successfully: PASS - Toast: 'Test sent via AKNexus Business API!'
Frontend UI Tests.BotMasterSender Test button sends succes: PASS - Toast: 'Test sent via Default Config!'

AKNexus Business API.status: REAL API - Working (text and media sends confirmed)

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKS - Both AKNexus and BotMasterSender APIs are REAL and working. AKNexus uses POST to /api/send with access_token in body. BotMasterSender uses GET with query parameters.
